query:
INSERT INTO appeals (parcelId, currentAssessedValue, appealedValue, appealReason, appealDate, status, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES 
('112054', 450000, 380000, 'Recent comparable sales in neighborhood show lower values', '2026-02-11', 'pending', NOW(), NOW()),
('112073', 520000, 475000, 'Property assessment includes incorrect square footage', '2026-02-11', 'pending', NOW(), NOW()),
('112089', 380000, 340000, 'Market downturn in area not reflected in assessment', '2026-02-11', 'in_review', NOW(), NOW()),
('112105', 615000, 550000, 'Structural issues requiring expensive repairs not considered', '2026-02-11', 'hearing_scheduled', NOW(), NOW()),
('112121', 425000, 390000, 'Zoning changes have decreased property value', '2026-02-11', 'resolved', NOW(), NOW());
